title: marketing — settings
description: Tenant-facing marketing configuration + per-user preferences for the ROAS report subscription. The marketing_provider_configs table is NOT settings — those are per-provider credentials owned by the marketing module itself. This file declares tenant-level defaults (default retry schedule, notification routing) + per-user preferences (ROAS digest subscription).

groups.label: Marketing conversion tracking
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for marketing capture + dispatch.

sections.label: Capture defaults
sections.description: Tenant-wide defaults applied to newly-configured providers.

fields.name: default_test_mode
fields.label: New providers start in test mode
fields.helpText: Newly-configured providers default to test_mode=true so credentials are validated before going live.

sections.label: Notifications routing
sections.description: Where dead-letter + circuit-breaker alerts are delivered.

fields.name: dead_letter_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on dead letters
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives MarketingDeadLetterCreatedNotification. Tenant owners are always notified regardless.

fields.name: circuit_breaker_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on circuit-breaker opens

fields.name: slack_channel
fields.label: Slack channel for alerts
fields.helpText: Enterprise-only. Marketing alerts route to this Slack channel via the notifications module's Slack driver.

sections.label: Consent policy
sections.description: Consent categories required to capture + dispatch marketing events.

fields.name: required_consent_categories
fields.label: Required consent categories
fields.helpText: Compliance-critical. Regulators may require you to keep both marketing + advertising set.

fields.name: recheck_consent_on_dispatch
fields.label: Re-check consent at dispatch time
fields.helpText: When enabled, consent revoked between capture and dispatch is honoured (in-flight events are suppressed). Recommended: leave enabled.

groups.label: My marketing preferences
groups.description: Per-user preferences for marketing reports + alerts.

fields.name: receive_monthly_roas_report
fields.label: Send me the monthly ROAS report

fields.name: receive_dead_letter_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on marketing dead letters
fields.helpText: This preference only takes effect if the tenant admin listed you in dead_letter_notify_users. Owners always receive.
